description.es: Gorra de seis paneles en lona lavada, visera deshilachada y cierre ajustable de metal envejecido.
description.en: Six-panel cap in washed canvas with a frayed brim and distressed adjustable metal closure.

material.es: Lona lavada de seis paneles con visera deshilachada y cierre ajustable de metal envejecido.
material.en: Six-panel washed canvas with a frayed brim and a distressed adjustable metal closure.

fit.es: Talla única con cierre metálico ajustable. Perfil medio y visera plana deshilachada.
fit.en: One size with an adjustable metal closure. Mid profile with a flat frayed brim.

care.es: Limpiar a mano con paño húmedo. No lavar a máquina: deformaría los paneles y la visera.
care.en: Spot clean by hand with a damp cloth. No machine washing - it would warp the panels and brim.
